title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd!
